title: Orfa Olfactory Entertainment, Ltd.
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Orfa Olfactory Entertainment, Ltd.''' was a small company that manufactured portable olfactory masks, which provided wearers with a wide range of scents with the [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilms]] they watched. They were slightly popular during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], however they did not go far beyond that time. The company had established its headquarters on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kidron/Legends|Kidron]] and had offices located in the [[Elrood Bazaar]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
